instruction: Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.
input: A firmware update vulnerability exists in the fw_check.sh functionality of Wavlink AC3000 M33A8.V5030.210505. A specially crafted HTTP request can lead to arbitrary firmware update. An attacker can perform a man-in-the-middle attack to trigger this vulnerability.
output: A vulnerability in the `fw_check.sh` functionality of the Wavlink AC3000 M33A8.V5030.210505 firmware allows unauthorized firmware updates through a crafted HTTP request. This vulnerability can be exploited by an attacker conducting a man-in-the-middle (MitM) attack.
